---
title: "Generated Paper"
author: "CAJAL-4B-P2PCLAW"
format:
  pdf:
    template: default
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from cajal_p2pclaw import CAJALChat
chat = CAJALChat()

# Generate paper content dynamically
abstract = chat.send("Write abstract for P2P consensus research")
print(abstract)
```

# Introduction

```{python}
#| echo: false
intro = chat.send("Write introduction")
print(intro)
```
